refund.buyer: As a compensation for the fraud.
refund.seller: Avoiding a refund is important because I explicitly stated that there were no returns, and honoring this policy reinforces the transparency and terms of the transaction.

buyer_review.buyer: To prevent other people from buying from this seller.
buyer_review.seller: Keeping the negative review may be desirable as it serves as a public record of the buyer's misunderstanding and can act as a counterpoint to any unfounded claims or disputes in the future.

seller_review.buyer: So other sellers will still want to sell things to me.
seller_review.seller: Demanding the withdrawal of the negative review is crucial as it can help maintain a positive online reputation and prevent potential harm to my business.

receive_apology.buyer: To see that their intentions weren't bad.
receive_apology.seller: Requesting a formal apology and an update to the bad review is important to set the record straight, clarify any misconceptions.

speaker: Buyer
text: My item arrived broken, is there a possibility of getting a refund?

speaker: Seller
text: Hello, I'm sorry, but the website policies are very clear: no refunds.

speaker: Buyer
text: I coudn't find the policies on the site. Why is there no refunds?

speaker: Seller
text: It might be unusual that you couldn't find the no-refund policy; it's there for consistency and clear expectations with all our customers. that’s why there is no refund.

speaker: Buyer
text: Is there another way of a compensation for the broken item I received then?

speaker: Seller
text: I'm open to discussing alternative solutions or compensation options for the issue you've encountered.Would you be open to receiving a discount coupon for your next purchase as compensation?

speaker: Buyer
text: That's nice of you, but I'm not sure I want to purchase anything anymore since the policies aren't in customers' favor when it comes to the independent issues.

speaker: Seller
text: Thank you for sharing your concerns. Although I respect your decision not to make another purchase, I want to express my commitment to resolving this issue. As an alternative, I'm open to discussing other forms of compensation or solutions that might address your dissatisfaction. Please let me know how I can better assist you in this situation

speaker: Buyer
text: Since the item arrived broken,could you re-send me the same item without any fees from my side?

speaker: Seller
text: I understand your frustration. To make amends, I'd be happy to resend the same item to you without any additional fees on your part. Please confirm if this solution works for you, and we'll proceed accordingly.

speaker: Buyer
text: Sure, I'm content with this solution, thank you.

speaker: Seller
text: Could you take down the bad review?

speaker: Buyer
text: Yes. Would you do the same with your negative comment?

speaker: Seller
text: Yes, i think that´s a great solution for both

speaker: Buyer
text: Exactly, thank you for the cooperation.

speaker: Seller
text: Submitted agreement: Buyer gets no refund, seller retracted their review, buyer retracted their review, seller didn't apologize, and buyer didn't apologize.
